MODULE: cosmos.core.attention_router
FILE: cosmos/core/attention_router.py (377 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: Advanced Attention Routing - Autonomous Improvement #5 by Claude Sonnet 4.5

PROBLEM: Simple keyword matching doesn't capture conversation context
SOLUTION: Topic modeling + expertise tracking + context history

WHO SHOULD RESPOND TO WHAT:
- Philosophy → Kimi (Eastern philosophy expert)
- Analysis →

CLASSES:
- Topic: A conversation topic.
- SpeakerExpertise: Track speaker expertise in various topics.
- AttentionRouter: Advanced routing system that tracks topics and speaker expertise.

Makes intelli
  Methods: def detect_topics(self, message: str, context: Optional[str]=None) -> list[Tuple[str, float]]
  Methods: def get_active_topics(self) -> list[str]
  Methods: def route_message(self, message: str, last_speaker: Optional[str]=None, available_speakers: list[str
  Methods: def suggest_multi_hop(self, message: str, initiator: str, available: list[str]) -> list[str]
  Methods: def get_stats(self) -> dict

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def get_attention_router() -> AttentionRouter
- def route_to_best_speaker(message: str, last_speaker: Optional[str], available: list[str], context: Optional[str]=None) 
- def detect_message_topics(message: str) -> list[Tuple[str, float]]
- def get_routing_stats() -> dict
